description_long: This object depicts a child with a highly distorted and elongated body, as if stretched or warped in an unnatural manner. The head is realistic and childlike, with short hair, while the torso and limbs are exaggeratedly extended and twisted, creating a surreal, almost ribbon-like appearance. The upper body appears to be pulled upward by two long, thin extensions, while the legs are bent and contorted, with one leg forming a spiral shape. The clothing is form-fitting, with a clear distinction between the upper and lower garments, and the feet are visible at the ends of the elongated legs. The overall form is dynamic and abstract, suggesting motion or transformation. The surface texture appears smooth, with subtle shading that accentuates the stretched anatomy.
description: A surreal, elongated child figure with a realistic head and highly stretched, twisted limbs, dressed in form-fitting clothing. The body is contorted in a dynamic, abstract pose with smooth surface texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the child's face, chest, and both legs, with the body dramatically stretched upward and outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the head, the extreme elongation of the torso, and the spiral shape of the left leg.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the head, the stretched back, and both legs, with the right leg more visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the side of the head, the twisted torso, and the spiral left leg extending forward.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve fitted top and fitted pants
attribute_posture: body dramatically stretched and contorted, as if being pulled upward
